issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: extract-invoice-tables-to-csv
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the required OCR instance, read call, table iteration, DataFrame conversion, CSV writing, and row count printing (though it omits column names), whereas Response A provides only installation and command‑line usage without any code snippet that meets the rubric.

scenarios.name: process-handwritten-medical-form
scenarios.rationale: Response A is closer to the rubric, using the correct OCR class and mixed mode, though it omits some required prints and key names; Response B uses a different API and misses several rubric items.
